en: But perhaps that is my fault. I cannot train you the way I have trained the five.
ko: 하지만 아마 내 잘못이야. 다섯을 훈련시킨 방식으로는 널 훈련할 수 없거든.

en: And I see that the way to get through to you is with this.
Good. When you have been trained, you ate.
ko: 좋아. 훈련이 끝나면 먹을 수 있어.

en: After you panda. Just like that?
No sit-ups. No, no, no, no, no ten-mile hike.
ko: 윗몸일으키기도 없고. 아니 아니 16킬로 하이킹도 없고.

en: I vowed to train you and you have been trained.
I said you are free to eat. Have a dumpling.
ko: 먹어도 된다고 했잖아. 만두 하나 먹어.

en: You are free to eat. Am I? Are you?
